allow: PowerShell(git ls-files | Group-Object { \($_ -split '/'\)[0] } | Select-Object Name, Count; echo "---SENSITIVE CHECK---"; git ls-files | Select-String -Pattern '\\.env|\\.db|\\.sqlite|dist/|node_modules|public/|uploads/|\\.log$|\\.tsbuildinfo' ; echo "---ROOT FILES---"; git ls-files | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '/' })
